title: Conditional Coloring for labels
excerpt: We have several columns that contains different labels. It would be great if we can apply different colors to each labels so it’s easy to spot which is which. Like for a simple yes or no label. It would be easy to spot i…

posts.author: connie_bluprint (Connie Valiente)
posts.cookedHtml:
We have several columns that contains different labels. It would be great if we can apply different colors to each labels so it’s easy to spot which is which. Like for a simple yes or no label. It would be easy to spot if it’s yes or no if there are colors especially if we have multiple label columns like below.
